title: AgDataBOM Purpose-Phase Matrix
description: Normative WG35 artifact mapping AgDataBOM IntendedProcessingPurpose values to CRISP-DM lifecycle phases with PERMIT/RESTRICTED/DENY governance decisions and XACML 3.0 rule references. PSG-WG35-2026-001.
publisher: AgGateway WG35 DataBOM Stewardship Metadata Working Committee
chair: P. Isaac Riley, Pinnacle Systems Group LLC

purposeMatrix.description: Documentation of harvest operations for producer records, lender reporting, and supply chain traceability. Primary field operations use case.
purposeMatrix.lb525Alignment: Section 4 — producer operational data; consent required for secondary use

purposeMatrix.description: Documentation of planting operations including seed variety, population, depth, and spatial coverage.
purposeMatrix.lb525Alignment: Section 4 — producer operational data; seed purchase intent inference risk

purposeMatrix.description: Documentation of chemical, fertilizer, or biological product applications. Includes as-applied rate, product identity, and spatial coverage.
purposeMatrix.lb525Alignment: Section 4 — input purchase inference; Section 6 — pesticide application regulatory reporting carve-out

purposeMatrix.description: Delivery of agronomic prescriptions to field equipment. Data flows from FMIS to task controller. Governance governs the prescription record, not the equipment command.
purposeMatrix.lb525Alignment: Section 5 — agronomic service provider relationship; prescription IP ownership

purposeMatrix.description: Agronomic analysis and advisory services. Data used to generate recommendations. Producer retains ownership of underlying operational data.
purposeMatrix.lb525Alignment: Section 5 — express consent required; derived model outputs not covered by producer consent

purposeMatrix.description: Anonymized research use. Geospatial precision reduced to county level. Producer identity removed. Temporal granularity reduced to crop year.
purposeMatrix.lb525Alignment: Section 7 — anonymization safe harbor; county-level spatial floor required

purposeMatrix.description: Reporting to agricultural lenders for loan origination, servicing, or crop insurance purposes. Governed by existing FCRA and GLBA frameworks in addition to LB525.
purposeMatrix.lb525Alignment: Section 8 — financial services carve-out; FCRA overlay; CeR framework integration point

purposeMatrix.description: Data provided to government regulatory bodies under statutory obligation. DENY at Modeling and Deployment phases prevents regulatory data from re-entering commercial analytics pipelines.
purposeMatrix.lb525Alignment: Section 9 — government reporting obligation; secondary commercial use prohibited
